articleSaved: Article has been saved to your list.
articleRemoved: Article has been removed from your list.
noSavedArticlesDescription: Long press an article in the feed or double tap an article in the reel to save it to your list.
settingRssDescription: Enter the URL of the RSS feed you want to subscribe to.
settingReaderModeDescription: Enable reader mode to make article content more readable.
hint1Description: RSS Reels is an app that displays the latest articles from your subscribed RSS feeds in a reel format. Tap an article to read the full content on the original website. Add RSS feed URLs in the Settings tab to customize the app to your preferences.
hint1Summary: Welcome to RSS Reels! This app displays RSS feeds in a short and engaging reel format. Add your RSS feed URLs in the Settings tab.
hint2Description: In the Feed tab, you can browse the latest articles from your added RSS feeds.
hint2Summary: In the Feed tab, you can browse the latest articles from your added RSS feeds. Tap any article to view its details.
hint3Description: In the Settings tab, you can add or remove RSS feed URLs and configure other settings.
hint3Summary: In the Settings tab, you can add or remove RSS feed URLs and configure other settings. You can also check the app version information here.
autoScrollHint: The reels will automatically scroll every 5 seconds. Long press on an article to open the settings.
externalLink.title: External Link
